<<United Kingdom Composition>>

The United Kingdom is made up of four countries. These countries are England, Scotland, Wales, and Northern Ireland. Each of these nations has its own unique culture and history.

* * *

The United Kingdom is a constitutional monarchy. The monarch serves as a symbolic figurehead. The government is run by elected officials.

* * *

The United Kingdom has a parliamentary system. The House of Commons is the main legislative body. The Prime Minister leads the government. [homework] is often assigned to students.
